description: A pricing analyst for a retail fuel brand needs to update the gasoline and diesel prices for a set of stations based on competitor prices and market costs.

nodes.task_description: Gather the latest street-level prices for key competitors near station #6789.

expected_outcome.value: A list of competitor prices is retrieved from a price monitoring service.

nodes.task_description: Using the company's pricing model, calculate the new optimal prices for all fuel grades at the station.

expected_outcome.value: The pricing algorithm recommends new prices to maintain a target margin while staying competitive.

nodes.task_description: Push the new prices to the station's point-of-sale (POS) system and electronic price sign.

expected_outcome.value: The prices at the gas station are successfully updated.
